introSection: Longfeng Roller Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Chuanlord Holiday Manor in Shunde, Foshan, Guangdong, China. On 14 February 2013, there was a special Valentine's Day event on the coaster, but work was still being done in March and the coaster didn't open until later in 2013.
fullText: Longfeng Roller Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Chuanlord Holiday Manor in Shunde, Foshan, Guangdong, China. On 14 February 2013, there was a special Valentine's Day event on the coaster, but work was still being done in March and the coaster didn't open until later in 2013.
